name: NAPPIER-XMD 🚀
description: ⚡ A powerful WhatsApp bot built to dominate chats with style! Powered by Node.js for maximum performance.

SESSION_ID.description: 🔐 Your bot's secret key. Use Pairing code or QR to get this or *NAPPIER-XMD* won't start! 😤

OWNER_NUMBER.description: 📱 Your WhatsApp number (with country code, no +). Who's runnin' this show? 💪

OWNER_NAME.description: 👑 Your name, the boss of *NAPPIER-XMD*. Flex it in the bot's credits! 😎

PREFIX.description: 🔠 Command trigger (e.g., '.' for .ping). Keep it short or look like a clown! 🤡
